items.title_zh: 年内暴涨18倍，营收却只7个亿： 智谱再刷大模型神话
items.title_en: Zhipu Surges 18x This Year with Only 700M Revenue: LLM Myth Continues
items.summary_zh: 年内暴涨18倍，营收却只7个亿： 智谱再刷大模型神话 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's stock has surged 18-fold this year despite annual revenue of only 700 million yuan, raising questions about valuation. The company's market cap exceeds 900 billion HKD, highlighting high expectations and commercialization challenges in the AI industry.
items.why_zh: 智谱的估值与营收严重背离，反映了市场对大模型赛道的狂热与泡沫风险。
items.why_en: The huge gap between Zhipu's valuation and revenue reflects market frenzy and bubble risk in the LLM sector.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek融资信息更新，梁文锋豪掷200亿、腾讯宁德等巨头入局
items.title_en: DeepSeek Funding Update: Liang Wenfeng Invests 20B, Tencent and CATL Join
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek融资信息更新，梁文锋豪掷200亿、腾讯宁德等巨头入局 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's latest funding round sees founder Liang Wenfeng personally invest 20 billion yuan, with Tencent and CATL also participating. The massive round signals strong market confidence and cross-industry interest in AI infrastructure.
items.why_zh: 梁文锋个人巨额投资及腾讯、宁德等跨界入局，凸显DeepSeek在AI领域的战略地位。
items.why_en: Liang's personal investment and cross-industry participation highlight DeepSeek's strategic importance in AI.

items.title_zh: “全球大模型第一股”智谱股价创历史新高 总市值突破9000亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu Stock Hits Record High, Market Cap Exceeds 900 Billion HKD
items.summary_zh: “全球大模型第一股”智谱股价创历史新高 总市值突破9000亿港元 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's stock hits an all-time high, with market cap surpassing 900 billion HKD, making it the world's first listed LLM company. Despite low revenue, investor optimism drives the rally, though high valuation poses risks.
items.why_zh: 智谱市值突破9000亿港元，成为大模型领域标杆，但营收与估值背离需警惕。
items.why_en: Zhipu's market cap milestone makes it a benchmark in LLMs, but the revenue-valuation gap warrants caution.

items.title_zh: 年内暴涨18倍，营收却只7个亿： 智谱再刷大模型神话
items.title_en: Zhipu's Stock Surges 18x This Year, Revenue Only 700M Raises Bubble Concerns
items.summary_zh: 年内暴涨18倍，营收却只7个亿： 智谱再刷大模型神话 凤凰网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's stock has surged 18 times this year, yet its revenue is only 700 million yuan, raising concerns about a valuation bubble. The stark contrast between high valuation and low profitability has led investors to question the commercialization prospects of AI startups in China's competitive LLM market.
items.why_zh: 反映了AI大模型公司高估值与低营收之间的巨大落差，警示市场泡沫风险。
items.why_en: Highlights the gap between AI LLM companies' high valuations and low revenues, warning of market bubble risks.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek“识图模式”上线！实测：不认识梁文锋，分不清张一鸣，看得懂英文，看不懂中文草书
items.title_en: DeepSeek Launches Image Recognition Mode: Limited Capabilities, Struggles with Chinese Cursive
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek“识图模式”上线！实测：不认识梁文锋，分不清张一鸣，看得懂英文，看不懂中文草书 搜狐网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's new image recognition mode shows limited capabilities: it fails to recognize celebrities like Liang Wenfeng and Zhang Yiming, and struggles with Chinese cursive script while handling English well. The feature is still in early stages and lags behind mainstream multimodal models.
items.why_zh: 展示了国产大模型在多模态能力上的不足，与领先模型仍有差距。
items.why_en: Reveals the gap in multimodal capabilities between domestic LLMs and leading models.

items.title_zh: OpenAI企业AI销售主管Barret Zoph入职仅五个月再次离职
items.title_en: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
items.summary_zh: 据The Verge报道，OpenAI企业AI销售主管Barret Zoph在重返公司仅五个月后再次离职。Zoph曾短暂担任由前OpenAI CTO Mira Murati创立的竞争公司Thinking Machines Lab的联合创始人兼CTO，于今年1月中旬回归OpenAI，负责领导企业业务拓展。OpenAI近期强调将聚焦企业和编码等核心收入驱动因素，为IPO做准备，Zoph的离职可能影响其企业战略推进。
items.summary_en: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned. Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as co-founder and CTO of Thinking Machines Lab, the competing AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati. Shortly after Zoph returned to OpenAI, the company said he would lead its push into enterprise - a significant role at OpenAI, since in recent months it had vowed to stop chasing so-called "side quests" and focus on key revenue drivers like enterprise and coding ahead of its planned IPO. OpenAI co…
items.why_zh: OpenAI关键高管频繁离职，可能影响其企业业务和IPO进程。
items.why_en: Key executive departures at OpenAI could affect its enterprise business and IPO plans.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek完成510亿元A轮融资，梁文锋出资200亿元
items.title_en: DeepSeek Completes 51 Billion Yuan Series A, Liang Wenfeng Contributes 20 Billion
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek完成510亿元A轮融资，梁文锋出资200亿元 新浪网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek completes a 51 billion yuan Series A round, with founder Liang Wenfeng personally investing 20 billion. The record-sized round will fund model development and compute infrastructure, boosting its LLM competitiveness.
items.why_zh: 510亿元A轮融资创AI领域纪录，梁文锋个人出资彰显信心，DeepSeek有望加速发展。
items.why_en: The record 51B Series A, with Liang's personal stake, signals strong confidence and potential acceleration for DeepSeek.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek 510亿融资背后：腾讯领投宁德跨界，阿里字节为何旁观？
items.title_en: Behind DeepSeek's 51B Funding: Tencent Leads, CATL Crosses Over; Why Did Alibaba and ByteDance Sit Out?
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 510亿融资背后：腾讯领投宁德跨界，阿里字节为何旁观？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's 51B Series A is led by Tencent with CATL joining, while Alibaba and ByteDance abstain. Tencent strengthens its AI ecosystem, and CATL's involvement highlights energy giants' interest in AI compute demand.
items.why_zh: 腾讯领投、宁德跨界，阿里字节缺席，反映AI投资格局的分化与战略差异。
items.why_en: Tencent leading and CATL crossing over, while Alibaba and ByteDance sit out, reveals divergent AI investment strategies.

items.title_zh: AI与系统工程十年回顾与展望：从基础到LLM拐点
items.title_en: AI4SE and SE4AI Exploration: A Decade Looking Back and Forward
items.summary_zh: 一篇arXiv论文回顾了AI与系统工程（SE）领域过去十年的发展，将其分为基础、应用和LLM拐点三个阶段。该领域自2020年INCOSE特刊后迅速发展，年度研讨会注册人数超250人。论文总结了社区共识和关键差距，并探讨了人机协作等前沿问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19630v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The March 2020 INCOSE INSIGHT special issue on AI and Systems Engineering (SE) became the most downloaded issue in the publication's history and launched a research community that now draws over 250 registrants to its annual workshop. In this article, we trace the progress in AI and SE across three phases (labeled here foundational, applied, and LLM inflection) based on the authors' reading of the field's core papers, and describe our opinions of where the community has converged and where critical gaps remain. Separately, a human-AI agreement li…
items.why_zh: 该综述为AI与系统工程交叉领域提供了十年全景，有助于理解技术演进脉络。
items.why_en: This survey provides a decade-long overview of AI and SE, helping understand the technology evolution.

items.title_zh: 新基准测试评估AI审稿系统：性能参差不齐
items.title_en: Benchmarking Agentic Review Systems
items.summary_zh: arXiv上发布的一项新研究提出了一个基准测试，用于评估AI审稿系统。研究评估了三个系统（OpenAIReview、coarse和Reviewer3）以及一个零样本基线，涵盖六个大语言模型。结果显示，AI审稿与论文质量（以引用和接受决定为指标）的关联性因系统而异，所有系统表现均不理想。该研究强调了AI辅助同行评审的挑战，并呼吁建立更完善的评估标准。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19749v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A new class of agentic review systems are emerging as a remedy to the pressure placed on peer review systems by AI-assisted research, but it is unclear how they should be evaluated. We evaluate two open-source systems (OpenAIReview and coarse), one proprietary system (Reviewer3), and a zero-shot baseline, across six LLMs spanning frontier and efficient models. First, we study whether AI reviews on ICLR/NeurIPS papers track with papers' quality as approximated by external signals such as citations and acceptance decisions. Every system performs ab…
items.why_zh: 揭示了当前AI审稿系统的局限性，对学术同行评审自动化提出警示。
items.why_en: Reveals limitations of current AI review systems, cautioning against automation of academic peer review.

items.title_zh: Multi-LCB：将LiveCodeBench扩展至多编程语言
items.title_en: Multi-LCB: Extending LiveCodeBench to Multiple Programming Languages
items.summary_zh: LiveCodeBench（LCB）是评估大语言模型代码生成能力的流行基准，但仅限于Python。新研究Multi-LCB将其扩展至多种编程语言，包括C++、Java、JavaScript等。通过引入多语言竞争编程问题，Multi-LCB能够更全面地评估LLM的代码生成泛化能力。初步结果显示，模型在不同语言上的表现差异显著，凸显了多语言评估的必要性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20517v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LiveCodeBench (LCB) has recently become a widely adopted benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) on code-generation tasks. By curating competitive programming problems, constantly adding fresh problems to the set, and filtering them by release dates, LCB provides contamination-aware evaluation and offers a holistic view of coding capability. However, LCB remains restricted to Python, leaving open the question of whether LLMs can generalize across the diverse programming languages required in real-world software engineering. We intro…
items.why_zh: 填补了多语言代码生成评估的空白，推动LLM在真实软件工程场景中的应用。
items.why_en: Fills the gap in multilingual code generation evaluation, advancing LLM applications in real-world software engineering.

items.title_zh: 研究揭示扩散LLM中上下文学习的位置偏差并提出缓解方法
items.title_en: Where to Place the Query? Unveiling and Mitigating Positional Bias in In-Context Learning for Diffusion LLMs via Decoding Dynamics
items.summary_zh: arXiv上的一项新研究首次系统分析了扩散大语言模型（dLLM）中上下文学习的位置偏差。与自回归模型不同，dLLM使用双向注意力，理论上查询可以放在任何位置。但研究发现，查询位置显著影响性能，存在位置偏差。研究提出了基于解码动态的缓解方法，为dLLM的上下文学习提供了优化方向。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19349v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While In-Context Learning (ICL) is extensively studied in Autoregressive (AR) LLMs, its mechanism within Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) remains largely unexplored. Unlike AR models restricted by unidirectional causal masking, dLLMs intrinsically utilize bidirectional attention, offering extensive spatial flexibility for query placement. Unfortunately, current practices conventionally inherit AR-style trailing-query templates, often overlooking the structural paradigm shift. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis unveiling that qu…
items.why_zh: 揭示了扩散LLM与自回归模型在上下文学习上的本质差异，为优化提供新思路。
items.why_en: Reveals fundamental differences in ICL between diffusion and autoregressive LLMs, offering new optimization directions.

items.title_zh: 提出“玩耍式”智能体机器人学习：通过自主探索持续获取技能
items.title_en: Playful Agentic Robot Learning
items.summary_zh: arXiv上的一项新研究提出“玩耍式智能体机器人学习”，让机器人通过自主探索（玩耍）持续学习技能，无需明确指令。研究团队设计了RATs（机器人智能体团队），在玩耍阶段提出新颖且可学的探索任务。该方法使机器人能够在下游任务到来前积累可复用技能，提高学习效率和适应性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19419v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current agentic robot systems can write executable Code-as-Policy programs, observe feedback, and revise behavior across multiple attempts, but they remain largely task-driven: reusable skills are acquired only after explicit instructions. We study Playful Agentic Robot Learning, where an embodied coding agent uses self-directed play as a continual skill-learning stage before downstream tasks arrive. We introduce RATs, Robotics Agent Teams designed for play-time skill acquisition. During play, RATs proposes novel yet learnable exploratory tasks…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种无需人工干预的机器人技能持续学习范式，有望提升机器人的自主性和适应性。
items.why_en: Proposes a paradigm for continuous robot skill learning without human intervention, potentially enhancing autonomy and adaptability.

items.title_zh: 基于整流流变压器的胸部X光生成基础模型
items.title_en: Scaling Generative Foundation Models for Chest Radiography with Rectified Flow Transformers
items.summary_zh: 该研究首次引入了从零开始训练的十亿参数级胸部X光片生成基础模型。现有放射学AI模型在患者亚群、机构和采集设置之间泛化能力差，限制了临床实用性。可控、高保真的胸部X光片合成有望丰富临床数据集并评估诊断模型的鲁棒性。该模型是迄今最大的专业生成基础模型，旨在解决数据多样性和模型评估问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19460v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce the first generative foundation model for chest radiograph synthesis trained from scratch at the billion-parameter scale. Existing radiographic AI models often suffer from poor generalisation across patient subpopulations, institutions, and acquisition settings, resulting in limited real-world clinical utility. Controlled, high-fidelity synthesis of chest radiographs is a promising path toward diversifying clinical datasets and evaluating the robustness of diagnostic models. Therefore, we present the largest specialist generative f…
items.why_zh: 该模型是首个十亿参数级的胸部X光生成基础模型，有望显著提升放射学AI的泛化能力和临床实用性。
items.why_en: It is the first billion-parameter generative foundation model for chest radiography, potentially improving generalization and clinical utility of radiographic AI.

items.title_zh: 边缘设备上LLM LoRA微调的峰值内存缩减技术
items.title_en: Techniques for Peak Memory Reduction for LoRA Fine-tuning of LLMs on Edge Devices
items.summary_zh: 在消费级硬件上使用LoRA微调大语言模型面临严重的内存限制，尤其是对于数十亿参数和长上下文训练数据。本文提出了一套互补技术来减少内存占用而不牺牲模型质量，包括：基础模型量化与即时反量化、内存高效的优化器状态管理、以及梯度检查点等。这些技术协同工作，使得在边缘设备上微调大模型成为可能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19528v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on an end-user's data offers personalized experiences while keeping data private, but faces severe memory constraints on consumer hardware. Peak memory during fine-tuning often exceeds device limits, especially for models with billions of parameters and long-context training data. This paper introduces a suite of complementary techniques to reduce memory footprint without sacrificing model quality: (1) base model quantization with on-the-fly dequantization, (2) memory-…
items.why_zh: 该技术使得在资源受限的边缘设备上微调大语言模型成为可能，对隐私保护和个性化部署至关重要。
items.why_en: These techniques enable fine-tuning of large LLMs on resource-constrained edge devices, crucial for privacy-preserving and personalized deployment.

items.title_zh: PerceptionDLM：基于多模态扩散语言模型的并行区域感知
items.title_en: PerceptionDLM: Parallel Region Perception with Multimodal Diffusion Language Models
items.summary_zh: 现有大多数多模态大语言模型依赖自回归生成，限制了需要描述多个区域的感知任务的效率。本文提出PerceptionDLM，一种针对高效并行区域感知优化的多模态扩散语言模型。该模型基于PerceptionDLM-Base构建，后者在开源扩散MLLM中达到了最先进性能。PerceptionDLM能够同时生成多个区域的描述，显著提升效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19534v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual understanding tasks. However, most existing MLLMs rely on autoregressive generation, which limits their efficiency for perception tasks that require captioning multiple regions. In this work, we propose PerceptionDLM, a multimodal diffusion language model optimized for efficient parallel region perception. Built upon PerceptionDLM-Base, a strong foundational baseline that achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source diffusion MLLMs, our architecture…
items.why_zh: 该模型通过并行生成多个区域描述，显著提升了多模态感知任务的效率，是扩散语言模型在视觉理解中的重要进展。
items.why_en: It significantly improves efficiency in multimodal perception tasks by enabling parallel region captioning, advancing diffusion language models in visual understanding.

items.title_zh: GDGU：基于梯度差异的图遗忘方法用于电动汽车充电网络网络攻击定位
items.title_en: GDGU: A Gradient Difference-based Graph Unlearning Method for Cyberattack Localization in Electric Vehicle Charging Networks
items.summary_zh: 电动汽车充电站可能使配电馈线遭受网络攻击。机器学习方法（如图神经网络）可以定位被攻击的母线，但数据共享和模型训练面临挑战。隐私法规允许充电站所有者要求从已部署模型中删除其训练数据，但每次请求都从头重新训练计算成本过高。为此，本文研究了图遗忘方法，提出基于梯度差异的图遗忘算法，用于高效地移除特定数据的影响，同时保持攻击定位性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19566v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Electric vehicle charging stations (EVCSs) can expose distribution feeders to cyberattacks. While machine learning methods, including graph neural networks, can localize which bus is compromised, significant challenges remain in data sharing and model training. For example, privacy regulations grant EVCS owners the right to delete their training data from a deployed model, yet retraining from scratch on every request is computationally prohibitive. To address this, we study graph unlearning (GU) for EVCS cyberattack localization, formulated as…
items.why_zh: 该方法解决了隐私法规下模型数据删除的计算难题，为电动汽车充电网络的安全和隐私保护提供了可行方案。
items.why_en: It addresses the computational challenge of data deletion under privacy regulations, offering a practical solution for security and privacy in EV charging networks.

items.title_zh: 面向OpenSIL固件中LLM生成单元测试的库感知双重与迭代修复
items.title_en: Library-Aware Doubles and Iterative Repair for Large Language Model-Generated Unit Tests in OpenSIL Firmware
items.summary_zh: 验证底层C固件变更成本高昂，因为单元测试在严格的构建约束下脆弱易碎，缺失头文件、未解析符号和依赖不匹配常导致编译和链接失败。本研究为AMD维护的开源硅初始化库（openSIL）代码库引入了一种自动化单元测试编写工作流，通过大语言模型引导的多智能体流水线减少人工努力。该工作流结合自动生成、库感知的双重模拟和迭代修复，显著提高了单元测试的编译通过率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19725v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Validating changes in low-level C firmware is expensive because unit tests (UTs) are fragile under strict build constraints, where missing headers, unresolved symbols, and dependency mismatches frequently prevent compilation and linking. This study introduces an automated UT authoring workflow for the Open-Source Silicon Initialization Library (openSIL) firmware codebase maintained by Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) that reduces manual effort through a large language model (LLM) guided multi-agent pipeline. The workflow combines automated generati…
items.why_zh: 该工作流大幅减少了低层C固件单元测试编写的人工成本，对提升固件开发效率和可靠性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: It significantly reduces manual effort in unit test authoring for low-level C firmware, enhancing development efficiency and reliability.

items.title_zh: SARLO-80：全球80厘米斜视SAR语言光学数据集
items.title_en: SARLO-80: Worldwide Slant SAR Language Optic Dataset 80cm
items.summary_zh: 多模态基础模型因大型光学基准而快速发展，但合成孔径雷达的类似资源仍然有限。现有SAR-光学数据集大多依赖低分辨率、仅强度的地面距离检测产品，不保留复值SAR测量或原生采集几何，限制了物理基础的多模态学习。本文提出了SARLO-80，一个大规模公开数据集，结合了甚高分辨率SAR SLC、对齐的光学图像和自然语言描述，覆盖全球范围，分辨率为80厘米。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20523v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal foundation models have advanced rapidly thanks to large optical benchmarks, but comparable resources for synthetic aperture radar (SAR) remain limited. Existing SAR--optical datasets largely rely on low-resolution, intensity-only Ground Range Detected~(GRD) products and do not preserve complex-valued SAR measurements or native acquisition geometry, which restricts physically grounded multimodal learning. In particular, large-scale public datasets combining very-high-resolution (VHR) SAR SLC, aligned optical imagery, and natural-langu…
items.why_zh: 该数据集填补了高分辨率SAR多模态数据的空白，为物理基础的多模态学习和SAR-光学融合研究提供了关键资源。
items.why_en: It fills the gap in high-resolution multimodal SAR data, providing a key resource for physically grounded multimodal learning and SAR-optical fusion.

items.title_zh: 受监管社交媒体平台下的语言演化模拟：大语言模型与遗传算法的协同方法
items.title_en: Simulation of Language Evolution under Regulated Social Media Platforms: A Synergistic Approach of Large Language Models and Genetic Algorithms
items.summary_zh: 社交媒体平台常实施限制性政策来审核用户内容，促使用户创造性地发展规避语言策略。本文提出了一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，模拟在监管约束下语言策略的迭代演化。在该框架中，参与者智能体作为社交媒体用户不断演化其语言表达，而监管智能体模拟平台级别的政策违规评估。通过结合遗传算法，该框架能够有效模拟语言策略的适应和变异过程。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2502.19193v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Social media platforms frequently impose restrictive policies to moderate user content, prompting the emergence of creative evasion language strategies. This paper presents a multi-agent framework based on Large Language Models (LLMs) to simulate the iterative evolution of language strategies under regulatory constraints. In this framework, participant agents, as social media users, continuously evolve their language expression, while supervisory agents emulate platform-level regulation by assessing policy violations. To achieve a more…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了监管政策下语言策略的演化机制，对理解社交媒体内容审核与用户行为互动具有重要意义。
items.why_en: It reveals the evolution of language strategies under regulatory policies, important for understanding content moderation and user behavior on social media.

items.title_zh: LoRDO：低通信频率的分布式低秩优化
items.title_en: LoRDO: Distributed Low-Rank Optimization with Infrequent Communication
items.summary_zh: 通过DDP进行基础模型分布式训练受限于互连带宽。低通信频率策略减少了同步频率，但仍受优化器状态的内存和通信需求瓶颈。低秩优化器可以缓解这些限制，但在本地更新模式下，工作节点无法访问全批量梯度来计算低秩投影，导致性能下降。本文提出LoRDO，一个统一低秩优化与分布式训练的原则性框架，通过低秩投影和稀疏通信实现高效训练。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.04396v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Distributed training of foundation models via $\texttt{DDP}$ is limited by interconnect bandwidth. While infrequent communication strategies reduce synchronization frequency, they remain bottlenecked by the memory and communication requirements of optimizer states. Low-rank optimizers can alleviate these constraints; however, in the local-update regime, workers lack access to the full-batch gradients required to compute low-rank projections, which degrades performance. We propose $\texttt{LoRDO}$, a principled framework unifying low-ran…
items.why_zh: LoRDO解决了分布式训练中通信瓶颈和优化器状态内存问题，为大规模基础模型的高效分布式训练提供了新方法。
items.why_en: LoRDO addresses communication bottlenecks and optimizer state memory issues in distributed training, offering a new approach for efficient large-scale foundation model training.

items.title_zh: 闪烁多臂老虎机：动态动作可用性下的决策模型
items.title_en: Flickering Multi-Armed Bandits
items.summary_zh: 本文提出“闪烁多臂老虎机”（FMAB）框架，用于建模动作可用性动态变化环境中的序贯决策问题。在该框架下，智能体当前选择的动作会限制下一步可访问的动作子集，这种约束通过随机演化的图来形式化，其中动作仅限于局部邻域。这种移动受限结构带来了双重挑战：信息获取的统计需求与导航的物理开销。研究分析了FMAB在遗憾最小化方面的表现，并探讨了在资源受限场景下的优化策略。该工作为机器人导航、推荐系统等需要动态调整动作集的领域提供了理论基础。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.17315v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce Flickering Multi-Armed Bandits (FMAB) to model sequential decision-making in environments with changing action availability, where accessibility of the next action is restricted to a subset dependent on the agent's current choice. We formalize these constraints through stochastically evolving graphs where actions are limited to local neighborhoods. This mobility-constrained structure imposes a dual challenge: the statistical requirement of information acquisition and the physical overhead of navigation. We analyze FMAB unde…
items.why_zh: 该研究为动态环境中动作受限的决策问题提供了新理论框架，对机器人、推荐系统等实际应用具有指导意义。
items.why_en: This work provides a novel theoretical framework for decision-making under dynamic action constraints, with implications for robotics and recommendation systems.

items.title_zh: 3D生成扩散模型在GPU架构上的性能分析与优化
items.title_en: Performance Analysis and Optimization of 3D Generative Diffusion Models across GPU Architectures
items.summary_zh: 扩散模型已成为高保真3D MRI合成的关键工具，但其部署受限于巨大的GPU资源需求，这源于每个样本需要数百次U-Net评估以及高度异构的内核行为。本文对最先进的医学扩散模型Med-DDPM在三代NVIDIA架构上进行了全面的性能分析，研究了内核级运行时分解、指令混合特征、内存系统利用率、线程束级活动等。通过识别性能瓶颈，提出了针对性的优化策略，旨在降低计算开销并提升模型在医疗影像生成中的实用性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19365v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion models have become essential for high-fidelity 3D MRI synthesis, yet their deployment remains constrained by substantial GPU resource demands arising from hundreds of U-Net evaluations per sample and a highly heterogeneous kernel behavior. This paper performs a comprehensive performance analysis of the state-of-the-art medical diffusion model, Med-DDPM, across three generations of NVIDIA architectures to study kernel-level runtime breakdowns, instruction-mix characteristics, memory system utilization, warp-level activities, and profiler…
items.why_zh: 该研究为扩散模型在医疗影像领域的实际部署提供了关键性能优化指导，有助于降低硬件门槛。
items.why_en: This study provides critical performance insights for deploying diffusion models in medical imaging, potentially lowering hardware requirements.

items.title_zh: 科学机器学习在耦合流体流动与输运中的进展
items.title_en: Advances in Scientific Machine Learning for Coupled Fluid Flow and Transport
items.summary_zh: 本章综述了科学机器学习（SciML）在模拟耦合流体流动与输运现象中的最新进展，这些现象由不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程和标量输运方程控制。此类系统常见于浊流和热对流等应用，具有强非线性耦合和多尺度行为，使得高保真模拟计算成本高昂。为应对这一挑战，本章调研了构建高效替代模型的最先进SciML方法，包括线性降阶模型、神经网络代理等，并讨论了它们在加速仿真、不确定性量化等方面的潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19562v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This chapter reviews recent advances in Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) for modeling coupled fluid flow and transport phenomena governed by the incompressible Navier-Stokes and scalar transport equations. Such systems, found in applications like turbidity currents and thermal convection, feature strong nonlinear coupling and multiscale behavior that make high-fidelity simulations computationally expensive. To address this, the chapter surveys state-of-the-art SciML methods for building efficient surrogate models, including linear reduced-orde…
items.why_zh: 该综述为利用机器学习加速复杂流体模拟提供了系统性的方法总结，对工程和气候建模等领域有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: This review systematically summarizes machine learning methods for accelerating complex fluid simulations, valuable for engineering and climate modeling.

items.title_zh: 匹配市场与累积前景理论：迈向最优且鲁棒的对抗学习
items.title_en: Matching Markets meet Cumulative Prospect Theory: Towards Optimal and Adversarially Robust Learning
items.summary_zh: 本文研究竞争性双边匹配市场中的多智能体多臂老虎机问题，采用以人为中心的决策模型。为捕捉人类偏好，使用累积前景理论（CPT），该理论通过非线性权重函数（α-Hölder连续）对智能体的动作进行加权。CPT已被广泛应用于行为经济学和风险敏感机器学习中模拟人类偏好。文章分析了使用CPT权重扭曲奖励的最先进学习算法，并获得了在对抗性环境下的遗憾界，证明了算法的鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19883v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study a multi-agent multi-armed bandit problem in the competitive setup with two-sided matching markets under a human centric decision making model. To capture human preferences, we use cumulative prospect theory (CPT) that weighs the actions of the agent in a nonlinear fashion using a ($\alpha$-H\"older continuous) weight function. CPT has been widely used in behavioral economics and risk sensitive machine learning to emulate human preferences. We analyze the state-of-the-art learning algorithm with CPT weight distorted rewards and obtain a p…
items.why_zh: 该工作将行为经济学模型引入匹配市场学习，提升了算法在人类参与场景下的鲁棒性和实用性。
items.why_en: This work integrates behavioral economics into matching market learning, enhancing algorithm robustness in human-centric scenarios.

items.title_zh: 全局有界扰动下的对抗性老虎机优化
items.title_en: Adversarial Bandit Optimization with Globally Bounded Perturbations to Convex Losses
items.summary_zh: 本文研究对抗性老虎机优化问题，其中损失函数可能非凸且非光滑。每轮中，学习者选择一个动作并仅观察该动作下的损失。损失由一个底层凸且β-光滑的组件和一个对抗性扰动组成，该扰动可在观察学习者动作后选择，且受全局预算约束，控制其随时间累积的幅度。该框架将全局预算的后动作扰动模型从底层凸损失扩展到更一般的设置。文章提出了相应的算法并分析了其遗憾界。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19891v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study adversarial bandit optimization in which the loss functions may be non-convex and non-smooth. In each round, the learner selects an action and observes only the loss incurred at that action. The loss consists of an underlying convex and $\beta$-smooth component and an adversarial perturbation that may be chosen after observing the learner's action. The perturbations are subject to a global budget controlling their cumulative magnitude over time. This framework extends the globally budgeted, post-action perturbation model from underlying…
items.why_zh: 该研究扩展了对抗性老虎机问题的理论边界，对实际中可能存在的非凸损失和扰动具有指导意义。
items.why_en: This work extends the theoretical boundaries of adversarial bandit optimization to non-convex losses with bounded perturbations, relevant for real-world applications.

items.title_zh: 探索AlphaEarth和TESSERA嵌入在精细尺度局地气候区制图中的应用：瑞士五城市案例研究
items.title_en: Exploring the potential of AlphaEarth and TESSERA embeddings for Fine-scale Local Climate Zone Mapping: A case study across five cities in Switzerland
items.summary_zh: 理解城市空间形态对于气候建模、风险评估和可持续城市设计至关重要，局地气候区（LCZ）制图提供了基本框架。然而，许多城市仍使用约100米分辨率的粗粒度LCZ记录，不适用于精细尺度研究。本研究在瑞士五个城市中，比较了来自TESSERA和AlphaEarth的预计算嵌入与传统Sentinel-1/2复合数据，评估它们是否能够将粗粒度LCZ图升级到10米分辨率。结果表明，这些嵌入在提升LCZ制图精度方面具有潜力，为城市气候研究提供了更精细的数据支持。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20034v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding urban spatial morphology is critical for climate modeling, risk assessment, and sustainable urban design, and Local Climate Zone (LCZ) mapping provides the basic framework for this. However, many cities still use coarse ~100-m resolution LCZ records, which are unsuitable for fine-scale urban research. In this study, precomputed embeddings from TESSERA (Feng et al., 2025) and AlphaEarth (Brown et al., 2025) are compared to traditional Sentinel-1/2 (S1S2) composites in five Swiss cities to see if they can upscale coarse LCZ maps to 10…
items.why_zh: 该研究展示了AI嵌入在提升城市气候制图分辨率方面的应用价值，有助于更精细的城市规划和气候适应。
items.why_en: This study demonstrates the value of AI embeddings for improving urban climate mapping resolution, aiding finer-scale urban planning and climate adaptation.

items.title_zh: 稀疏性、叠加与遗忘：持续学习中表征保持的机制研究
items.title_en: Sparsity, Superposition, and Forgetting: A Mechanistic Study of Representation Retention in Continual Learning
items.summary_zh: 持续学习系统常常遗忘先前获得的知识，但驱动遗忘的机制在实践中难以隔离，因为真实数据集纠缠了多种因素。本文提出了一个受控的玩具世界框架，使这些机制变得可观察和可测试。通过使用合成生成器-分离器流水线，定义了真实潜在特征，构建了具有可调稀疏性和重叠的任务，并引入了表征强度和叠加（特征间的方向重叠）的可测量量。研究揭示了稀疏性和叠加如何影响遗忘，为设计更鲁棒的持续学习算法提供了见解。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20431v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Continual learning (CL) systems often forget previously acquired knowledge, yet the mechanisms driving forgetting remain hard to isolate in practice because real datasets entangle many factors. We present a controlled, toy-world framework that makes these mechanisms observable and testable. Using a synthetic generator-separator pipeline, we define ground-truth latent features, build tasks with tunable sparsity and overlap, and introduce measurable quantities for representation strength and superposition (directional overlap among features). We th…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过可控实验揭示了持续学习中遗忘的底层机制，为开发抗遗忘算法提供了理论指导。
items.why_en: This work reveals underlying mechanisms of forgetting in continual learning through controlled experiments, guiding the development of anti-forgetting algorithms.

items.title_zh: GB-LSR：基于单一全局带宽的快速局部光谱图像表示用于连续重建与超分辨率
items.title_en: GB-LSR: A Fast Local Spectral Image Representation with a Single Global Bandwidth for Continuous Reconstruction and Super-Resolution
items.summary_zh: 本文提出GB-LSR（全局带宽局部光谱表示），一种用于连续图像重建的固定网格局部光谱表示。图像域被划分为非重叠方形块，每个块携带截断傅里叶基的系数，这些系数由共享卷积编码器特征预测。一个可训练的标量带宽在所有块和图像间全局共享，任意连续坐标处的重建是固定大小的基收缩，其成本与图像大小无关。研究了三种变体，并展示了其在连续超分辨率等任务中的有效性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19617v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present GB-LSR (Global-Bandwidth Local Spectral Representation), a fixed-grid local spectral representation for continuous image reconstruction. The image domain is partitioned into non-overlapping square patches, each carrying coefficients for a truncated Fourier basis predicted from shared convolutional-encoder features. A single trainable scalar bandwidth is shared globally across all patches and images, and reconstruction at any continuous coordinate is a fixed-size basis contraction whose cost is independent of image size. We study thre…
items.why_zh: 该表示方法实现了与图像大小无关的重建成本，为高效连续图像超分辨率提供了新方案。
items.why_en: This representation achieves reconstruction cost independent of image size, offering an efficient solution for continuous image super-resolution.

items.title_zh: TensorFlow和Keras应用中的不良编码实践隐藏环境成本：资源泄漏与碳排放研究
items.title_en: The Hidden Environmental Cost of Poor Coding Practices in TensorFlow and Keras Applications: A Study on Resource Leaks and Carbon Emissions
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究揭示了机器学习应用中不良编码实践导致的资源泄漏问题，这些泄漏会显著增加能源消耗和二氧化碳排放。研究聚焦于两种常见的资源泄漏模式：不当模型复用（IMR）和未释放张量引用。尽管效率与可持续性在ML开发中至关重要，但资源泄漏带来的环境影响此前缺乏量化证据。该初步实证研究填补了这一空白，表明优化代码质量不仅提升性能，还能减少碳足迹。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19799v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Efficiency and sustainability are critical considerations in the development and deployment of machine learning (ML) applications. Among the factors influencing sustainability, resource leaks in ML code can introduce hidden inefficiencies that elevate energy consumption and CO2 emissions. Despite this, empirical evidence quantifying their environmental impact remains limited. This emerging results paper presents an initial empirical investigation of two common resource-leak smells, namely Improper Model Reuse (IMR) and Unreleased Tensor Referen…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次量化了ML代码中资源泄漏的环境影响，为开发者优化代码以降低碳排放提供了实证依据。
items.why_en: This study provides the first empirical evidence linking resource leaks in ML code to increased carbon emissions, highlighting the environmental importance of code quality.

items.title_zh: 评估深度学习模型在旋转机械故障诊断中处理认知不确定性和偶然不确定性的能力
items.title_en: Evaluating deep learning models for fault diagnosis of a rotating machinery with epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty
items.summary_zh: 该论文首次全面比较了多种不确定性感知的深度学习架构在旋转机械故障诊断中的表现。研究考虑了两种不确定性：认知不确定性（来自未见故障）和偶然不确定性（来自噪声）。通过不同场景的测试，评估了这些模型在检测故障时的可靠性。结果表明，不确定性感知模型在应对分布外数据和噪声方面具有优势，有助于提升工业诊断系统的鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2412.18980v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Uncertainty-aware deep learning (DL) models recently gained attention in fault diagnosis as a way to promote the reliable detection of faults when out-of-distribution (OOD) data arise from unseen faults (epistemic uncertainty) or the presence of noise (aleatoric uncertainty). In this paper, we present the first comprehensive comparative study of state-of-the-art uncertainty-aware DL architectures for fault diagnosis in rotating machinery, where different scenarios affected by epistemic uncertainty and different types of aleatoric uncertainty…
items.why_zh: 该研究为工业故障诊断中如何选择不确定性感知模型提供了重要参考，有助于提升系统在复杂环境下的可靠性。
items.why_en: This study provides crucial guidance for selecting uncertainty-aware models in industrial fault diagnosis, enhancing system reliability under real-world uncertainties.

items.title_zh: 异常检测基准测试需要重新思考
items.title_en: We Need to Rethink Benchmarking in Anomaly Detection
items.summary_zh: 尽管异常检测算法不断涌现，但基准测试结果显示进展停滞，新算法与基线方法性能差异微小。本文指出，当前评估方法存在局限性：一个仅检查单特征极值的简单算法竟能与最先进的深度学习方法竞争，尽管它在简单案例上也会失败。作者呼吁重新设计基准测试，以更准确地反映算法的真实能力，推动领域进步。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2507.15584v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Despite the continuous proposal of new anomaly detection algorithms and extensive benchmarking efforts, progress seems to stagnate, with only minor performance differences between established baselines and new algorithms. In this position paper, we argue that this stagnation is due to limitations in how we evaluate anomaly detection algorithms. In current benchmarks, a trivial algorithm that only checks for extreme values in individual features performs competitively with state-of-the-art deep learning methods, despite failing on simple cases…
items.why_zh: 该文揭示了异常检测领域基准测试的根本缺陷，为改进评估方法、推动算法创新提供了关键方向。
items.why_en: This paper identifies fundamental flaws in anomaly detection benchmarks, offering a critical direction for improving evaluation and driving algorithmic progress.

items.title_zh: 通过大语言模型引导实现零样本主动特征获取
items.title_en: Zero-Shot Active Feature Acquisition via LLM-Elicitation
items.summary_zh: 主动特征获取（AFA）通过顺序选择特征来辅助分类决策，但传统方法依赖大量标注数据。本文提出一种零样本AFA框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）的领域知识，但避免让其直接做决策。通过“引导式询问”，LLM仅提供可信的特征信息，而由独立规划器决定获取顺序。该方法在无需训练数据的情况下实现了有效的特征获取，平衡了LLM的知识优势与规划弱点。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.18933v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Active feature acquisition (AFA) sequentially selects which features to observe to reach a classification or ranking decision. Its central limitation is reliance on large amount of labeled data to fit probabilistic models guiding acquisition. Large language models (LLMs) supply unsupervised domain knowledge, but are poor sequential planners. Asking one to both know and decide conflates capabilities best kept separate. Here, we develop a framework for zero-shot AFA through disciplined elicitation: asking the LLM only for what it can be trusted…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了主动特征获取中数据稀缺的难题，通过巧妙利用LLM知识实现了零样本学习，具有广泛的应用前景。
items.why_en: This work overcomes the data scarcity limitation in active feature acquisition by leveraging LLM knowledge in a disciplined manner, enabling zero-shot learning with broad applicability.

items.title_zh: 基于深度学习的月球陨石坑地形相对导航
items.title_en: Deep Learning-Based Lunar Crater Terrain Relative Navigation
items.summary_zh: 准确的位置估计对于未来月球着陆任务至关重要，尤其是在地形特征稀疏的危险环境中。本文提出了一种结合深度学习陨石坑检测器和扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）的地形相对导航（TRN）算法。该检测器专为NASA陨石坑检测挑战赛设计，能从单目图像中分析陨石坑特征，并与已知地图匹配，从而实现精确的定位。实验表明，该方法在月球着陆场景中具有高精度和鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14776v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Accurate position estimation is crucial for the successful implementation of future lunar landings using autonomous vehicles, especially in dangerous environments with sparse terrain features. In this paper, we propose a terrain relative navigation (TRN) algorithm combining our deep-learning crater detector, which was designed specifically for the NASA Crater Detection Challenge problem, and an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Our detector analyzes crater features from the monocular images acquired from orbit, and their matches with crater…
items.why_zh: 该研究为月球自主着陆提供了高精度的导航方案，对未来的深空探测任务具有重要意义。

items.title_zh: 蔡崇信：阿里全面投入 AI，开源的主要推动力量来自中国企业
items.title_en: Joe Tsai: Alibaba Goes All-In on AI, Chinese Companies Lead Open Source
items.summary_zh: 6 月 19 日上午消息，昨日，阿里巴巴集团主席蔡崇信在欧洲科技峰会 VivaTech 2026 上，阐述了阿里巴巴全栈 AI 的发展战略。 蔡崇信在一场对谈中提出，AI 的总潜在市场规模（TAM）应当对标人类生产力本身。“AI 正在创造等同于人类智能和人类生产力的价值单元。放眼全球，超过 100 万亿美元的 GDP 中，至少有一半 ——50 万亿美元，是关于人类生产力和人类智能的，这就是 AI 的总潜在市场。 因此阿里巴巴正在全面投入 AI。 ” 蔡崇信强调，全栈 AI 是阿里巴巴面向未来的核心战略。 他进一步阐释了阿里巴巴在全栈 AI 上的优势。在能源层，阿里受益于中国高效低成本的能源供给；在基础设施层和模型层，阿里多年前已提早布局云计算和芯片，并拥有全球最受欢迎的开源模型千问（Qwen）；在应用层，阿里业务生态覆盖电商、即时零售、酒旅、地图等丰富场景，为 AI 提供了规模化部署入口。 谈及开源，蔡崇信表示，“当前， 全球 AI 开源的主要推动力量来自中国企业 。过去几年，阿里巴巴的团队在推动前沿模型的开源方面做出了巨大贡献，今天我们仍在不懈努力。” 来源新浪科技，原标题《蔡崇信：阿里全面投入 AI，全栈布局有巨大优势》
items.summary_en: Alibaba Chairman Joe Tsai outlined the company's full-stack AI strategy at VivaTech 2026, stating that AI's total addressable market should be measured against human productivity, which accounts for about $50 trillion of global GDP. He highlighted Alibaba's advantages in energy, cloud computing, chips, the open-source model Qwen, and diverse application scenarios. Tsai also noted that Chinese companies are the main drivers of global AI open source.
items.why_zh: 蔡崇信的发言揭示了阿里巴巴的AI战略布局，并强调了中国企业在全球AI开源中的领导地位。
items.why_en: Tsai's remarks reveal Alibaba's comprehensive AI strategy and underscore the leading role of Chinese companies in global AI open source.

items.title_zh: 全球首个 AI 艺术博物馆：谷歌协力打造，生成 12 亿像素超现实画面
items.title_en: World's First AI Art Museum Dataland Opens in LA, Powered by Google to Generate 1.2 Billion Pixel Surreal Images
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，谷歌昨日（6 月 18 日）发布博文，宣布携手艺术家 Refik Anadol， 在洛杉矶打造全球首个 AI 艺术博物馆 Dataland，将于明日（6 月 20 日）开馆。 博物馆位于 Frank Gehly 设计的 The Grand LA 综合体内，面积约 2500 平方米，是一个将数据转化为颜料、艺术实时演变的全感官生态系统。IT之家附上相关视频如下： 开幕展“Machine Dreams: Rainforest”由 Large Nature Model（大型自然模型）驱动，该模型基于大量自然世界数据集训练。 博物馆为将复杂环境数据转化为 12 亿像素的超生成现实，使用 Google Cloud（谷歌云）工具，包括 Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform（双子座企业智能体平台）和 Compute Engine（计算引擎），协调 GANs（生成对抗网络）、扩散模型和 Gemini 等 AI 模型。 博物馆创造全新交互范式：画廊与访客形成主动对话。Google 基础设施处理数据，生成动态声景、实时情绪感应，并通过算法增强气味，根据人类互动动态响应。 整个系统运行在 Google Cloud 高效计算基础设施上，使用 87% 无碳可再生能源，从入口票务到墙面像素均确保流畅可持续运行。
items.summary_en: Google and artist Refik Anadol opened Dataland, the world's first AI art museum in Los Angeles. The museum uses Google Cloud to transform environmental data into 1.2 billion pixel surreal artworks, featuring interactive soundscapes and scent generation.
items.why_zh: 该博物馆代表了AI与艺术融合的前沿，展示了谷歌在AI创意应用和可持续计算方面的实力。
items.why_en: This museum represents the cutting edge of AI-art fusion, showcasing Google's capabilities in creative AI applications and sustainable computing.

items.title_zh: 安踏发布“折纸科技”，试图从结构设计寻找跑鞋缓震新方向
items.title_en: Anta Launches 'Origami Technology' Running Shoes, Exploring New Cushioning via Structural Design
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，6月16日，安踏在上海创新创意设计研究院发布全新跑鞋技术平台“折纸科技（ANTA FOLD）”，并同步推出首款搭载该技术的跑鞋产品折纸H1。 过去十余年，运动鞋行业的创新主要围绕材料展开。从EVA、TPU到Pebax等高性能发泡材料，各大品牌持续通过中底材料升级提升缓震与回弹表现。近年来，随着材料性能逐渐接近瓶颈，越来越多品牌开始将研发重点延伸至结构设计领域，希望通过几何构型优化进一步释放性能空间。 安踏此次推出的“折纸科技”，正是这一趋势下的最新尝试。 根据安踏介绍，该项目由安踏创新实验室联合牛津大学、天津大学及浙江大学相关研究团队共同研发。与传统依赖材料软硬度实现缓震不同，折纸科技试图利用特定折叠结构实现受力形变与能量管理，从而构建一套新的中底缓震方案。 其核心思路源于折纸工程学（Origami Engineering）。 作为一门融合数学、材料学与结构力学的交叉学科，折纸工程近年来已被广泛应用于航空航天、机器人、医疗器械等领域。通过特定的折叠几何结构，材料能够在有限空间内实现更复杂的形态变化，并获得特殊的力学性能。 ANTA H1 安踏将这一原理引入跑鞋中底设计，通过预设的折叠单元结构，使中底在受到冲击时发生可控形变，在吸收冲击能量的同时提供支撑与回弹。 发布会上，多位参与项目研究的学者对相关原理进行了介绍。其中，牛津大学教授由衷分享了折纸结构在工程领域的发展情况…
items.summary_en: Anta unveiled its 'Origami Technology' running shoe platform, using foldable structures for cushioning. Developed with Oxford and Chinese universities, it marks a shift from material to structural innovation in sportswear.
items.why_zh: 该技术代表了运动鞋缓震设计的新方向，可能改变行业创新范式，从材料竞争转向结构设计竞争。
items.why_en: This technology represents a new direction in running shoe cushioning, potentially shifting industry innovation from materials to structural design.

items.title_zh: 英特尔确认将为部分苹果设备代工芯片，股价应声上涨 10.64%
items.title_en: Intel Confirms Chip Manufacturing for Some Apple Devices, Stock Surges 10.64%
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，科技媒体 AppleInsider 昨日（6 月 18 日）发布博文，报道称在今年 5 月相关代工消息流出后， 特朗普确认苹果将与英特尔合作，在美国本土设计制造芯片。 IT之家今年 5 月报道，《华尔街日报》援引知情人士消息称， 苹果和英特尔已达成初步协议 ，英特尔将为部分苹果设备代工芯片。 英特尔首席执行官陈立武随后回应称， 英特尔正在和多个客户合作 ，并表示：“我们期待为他们提供服务。” 特朗普昨日在 Truth Social 上宣布，苹果已同意与英特尔合作设计制造芯片，推动美国半导体制造。英特尔股价随即大涨 10.64%，苹果上涨 0.7%。 分析人士指出，英特尔将主要生产旧款或低端处理器，例如用于 iPad Pro 和 MacBook Air 的 M 系列芯片，以及非 Pro 版 iPhone 的芯片。 新款 iPhone 18 Pro Max 的 2 纳米芯片和 M5 系列仍将由台积电制造。英特尔 18A-P 工艺刚进入小规模测试，最早 2027 年中才能实现大规模出货。 特朗普在帖子中称，其政府投资英特尔时其市值约 1000 亿美元，如今已超过 6000 亿美元。同时，全球芯片短缺和 AI 芯片需求激增，导致英伟达取代苹果成为台积电最大客户，苹果被迫寻找替代方案。
items.summary_en: Intel confirmed it will manufacture chips for some Apple devices, causing its stock to rise 10.64%. Trump announced the partnership on Truth Social. Intel will produce older or lower-end processors, while advanced chips remain with TSMC.
items.why_zh: 英特尔获得苹果代工订单，标志着其代工业务取得重大突破，有助于提升美国半导体制造能力。
items.why_en: Intel securing Apple's chip orders marks a major breakthrough for its foundry business, boosting US semiconductor manufacturing.

items.title_zh: IT早报 0619：宁德时代利润超 7 家车企总和登热搜第一；我国首部 L3/L4 自动驾驶强制性国标公示；DeepSeek 识图模式正式上线；曝阿里将推“千问输入法”...
items.title_en: CATL Profit Exceeds 7 Automakers; China's First L3/L4 Autonomous Driving Standard; DeepSeek Image Recognition Launched
items.summary_zh: “IT早报”时间，大家好，现在是 2026 年 6 月 19 日星期五，今天的重要科技资讯有： 1、宁德时代利润超 7 家车企总和，网友关注、热搜第一 宁德时代 207 亿元的单季净利润，直接超过了奇瑞、吉利、比亚迪、上汽、长城、赛力斯和长安这 7 家中国头部车企的利润总和（合计约 175 亿元）。>> 查看详情 2、我国首部 L3/L4 自动驾驶强制性国标公示：2027 年 7 月起正式实施，车企靠模糊宣传抢市场的阶段结束 工信部就《智能网联汽车自动驾驶系统安全要求》等强制性国标公开征求意见。该标准作为国内首部针对 L3/L4 级自动驾驶的强制性国标，要求车企从证明能力转向论证安全，并引入安全档案机制，对 L3 的人机交接和 L4 的系统风险处置能力提出差异化要求。>> 查看详情 3、DeepSeek 识图模式正式上线 App 和网页端 DeepSeek 多模态研究员 Xiaokang Chen 6 月 18 日表示，DeepSeek 的识图模式已在网页和 App 端正式上线。IT之家测试，目前 DeepSeek 的 App 端识图模式依然提示“图片理解功能内测中”，网页端没有这项提示。>> 查看详情 4、微信、豆包之后，消息称阿里将推“千问输入法” 千问团队将推出名为“千问输入法”的独立 App，与 PC 端的千问语音输入法有一定区别，AI 功能、键盘会更贴合手机端操作，填补千…
items.summary_en: CATL's quarterly net profit of 20.7 billion yuan surpasses the combined profits of 7 major automakers. China's first mandatory L3/L4 autonomous driving standard is open for comment, effective July 2027. DeepSeek's image recognition mode is now live. Alibaba is reportedly launching a 'Qianwen Input Method' app.
items.why_zh: 这些新闻反映了AI和新能源领域的快速发展，以及中国在自动驾驶和AI应用方面的政策与市场动态。
items.why_en: These stories highlight rapid progress in AI and new energy, as well as China's policy and market moves in autonomous driving and AI applications.

items.title_zh: 英特尔任命李锡熙为代工执行副总裁，强化 AI 芯片先进封装等
items.title_en: Intel Appoints Seok-Hee Lee as Foundry EVP to Strengthen AI Chip Advanced Packaging
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，英特尔昨日（6 月 18 日）发布公告，宣布任命李锡熙（Seok-Hee Lee）为英特尔代工执行副总裁， 直接向 CEO 陈立武（Lip-Bu Tan）汇报，强化 AI 计算能力。 李锡熙将全面负责先进封装、系统集成、后端技术开发与后端制造业务， 从而提升英特尔为客户提供差异化系统级创新的能力。 英特尔 CEO 陈立武表示： 先进封装和系统集成正成为下一代计算系统的关键能力。李锡熙在领导复杂大规模技术与制造组织方面拥有深厚专业知识，并具备卓越的运营执行记录。 他的见解将帮助英特尔进一步强化系统集成能力，紧密耦合领先的逻辑、内存、网络等组件，为英特尔代工客户构建高性能计算系统。 随着我们准备向客户和合作伙伴大规模量产 EMIB-T 和 HBI 等先进封装技术，李锡熙是建立并扩展这一关键业务的合适领导者。 IT之家查询公开资料，附上李锡熙相关履历如下： Intel 工程师（2000 - 2010 年）：在英特尔波特兰技术开发中心工作了 10 年，专注于先进制程整合和良率提升。曾 3 次荣获 Intel 最高技术成就奖。 KAIST 教授（2010 - 2013 年）：在韩国科学技术院（KAIST）电子工程系担任副教授，主要研究纳米级器件与半导体制造。 SK 海力士（2013 - 2022 年）： 2013 年加入，历任未来技术研究院院长、DRAM 开发…
items.summary_en: Intel appointed Seok-Hee Lee as Executive Vice President of Foundry, reporting to CEO Lip-Bu Tan. He will lead advanced packaging and system integration to enhance Intel's foundry capabilities. Lee has extensive experience at Intel, KAIST, and SK Hynix.
items.why_zh: 这一任命表明英特尔正加大在AI芯片先进封装领域的投入，以提升代工竞争力。
items.why_en: This appointment signals Intel's increased focus on advanced packaging for AI chips to boost its foundry competitiveness.

items.title_zh: 全球首次：我国科学家实现单神经元三模态完整解析
items.title_en: World First: Chinese Scientists Achieve Complete Tri-Modal Analysis of Single Neurons
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，据央视报道，中国科学院脑科学与智能技术卓越创新中心王凯研究团队与徐圣进研究团队联合在国际顶级学术期刊《细胞》上发表了一项重磅研究成果。 研究团队自主研发出基于成像的多模态解析平台“IMC”（Imaging-based Multimodal Characterization），在全球范围内首次实现了对同一神经元的功能活动、三维结构和分子基因表达三类信息的高精度同步解析。 大脑由约 860 亿个神经元构成，这些神经元在功能反应、形态结构以及基因表达上存在着巨大差异。要真正理解大脑的工作机制，必须搞清楚每一个神经元的三个核心维度： 一是功能，即细胞如何响应外界刺激、处理信息； 二是结构，即细胞的具体形态以及它如何与其他神经细胞建立连接； 三是分子，即细胞内部的基因表达和蛋白质组成。 然而，长期以来，全球神经科学界面临一个根本性的技术瓶颈 —— 神经元的分子、结构和功能这三类数据只能在不同实验体系下分开检测。不同检测设备与实验流程互不兼容，导致功能、结构、基因数据各自独立，形成了一座座无法打通的“数据孤岛”。 尽管各国脑科学计划已积累了海量的单模态数据，但由于缺乏来自同一个神经元的对应关系，这些数据无法进行有效的对比分析与联合解析。此前，国际上虽有研究报道了能够实现两类信息合并检测的技术，但三类信息的同步解析始终未能突破。 为攻克这一世界级难题，王凯与徐圣进…
items.summary_en: Chinese scientists developed the IMC platform to simultaneously analyze function, 3D structure, and gene expression of the same neuron for the first time. This breakthrough overcomes the long-standing data isolation problem in neuroscience.
items.why_zh: 该技术填补了神经科学领域多模态同步解析的空白，对理解大脑工作机制至关重要。
items.why_en: This breakthrough fills a gap in multimodal single-neuron analysis, crucial for understanding brain function.

items.title_zh: Kaseya发布开放AI平台，重心从收购转向整合

items.title_zh: Boltz宣布与武田合作，部署前沿生物分子AI模型
items.title_en: Boltz Announces Collaboration with Takeda to Deploy Frontier Biomolecular AI Models Across Takeda's Research Organization
items.summary_zh: 据PR Newswire报道，AI生物技术公司Boltz宣布与日本武田制药达成合作，将在武田的研究组织中部署其前沿生物分子AI模型。这些模型旨在加速药物发现和开发，通过预测蛋白质结构、分子相互作用等关键信息。合作将利用Boltz的AI平台优化武田的研发流程，有望缩短新药上市时间。这是AI在生物医药领域应用的重要案例，展示了AI如何赋能传统制药巨头。
items.summary_en: Boltz Announces Collaboration with Takeda to Deploy Frontier Biomolecular AI Models Across Takeda's Research Organization PR Newswire
items.why_zh: 体现了AI在生物医药领域的实际落地，对理解AI赋能传统行业具有示范意义。
items.why_en: Demonstrates AI's practical application in biopharma, serving as a model for AI empowering traditional industries.

items.title_zh: 谁来决定AI何时过于危险？Anthropic模型遭出口管制引发争议
items.title_en: Who decides when AI is too dangerous?
items.summary_zh: 在The Verge的Decoder节目中，资深AI记者Hayden Field讨论了Anthropic新模型Fable 5及其底层Mythos模型被美国政府实施出口管制的事件。管制措施限制外国国民访问这些模型，即使他们为美国公司工作。这引发了关于谁有权判定AI模型是否过于危险、以及出口管制是否合理的广泛争议。事件凸显了AI安全与地缘政治的交织，以及政府在AI治理中的角色。
items.summary_en: On today’s episode of Decoder , my guest is Hayden Field, senior AI reporter for The Verge . Often when Hayden comes on the show, it’s because something has gone wrong in the world of AI. Last weekend, that something was a pretty intense mix of Anthropic, the Trump administration, and Anthropic’s new AI model, Fable 5. On Friday, not even a week since Anthropic released Fable to the public, the US government said it was imposing export controls on the new model , as well as the underlying Mythos model that Fable is based on. Those controls restricted foreign nationals, even those working for A…
items.why_zh: 触及AI安全治理的核心问题——出口管制与模型开放性的平衡，对理解AI政策走向至关重要。
items.why_en: Addresses the core issue of AI safety governance—balancing export controls and model openness, crucial for understanding AI policy trends.

items.title_zh: 首个阿拉伯国家：阿联酋规定 15 岁以上人群才能使用社交媒体
items.title_en: UAE Sets Minimum Age of 15 for Social Media Use, First Arab Country
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 18 日消息，据路透社 18 日（今天）报道，阿拉伯联合酋长国将使用社交媒体的 最低年龄设为 15 岁 ，成为首个出台此类限制的阿拉伯国家。面对网络平台对儿童造成的影响，全球越来越多政府正在加强监管。 阿联酋批准了一项新规， 禁止 15 岁以下儿童创建或使用个人社交媒体账号 。阿联酋政府媒体办公室表示，15 岁以下儿童今后 不能发布、评论或分享内容 ，也不能加入公开群组。 15 岁和 16 岁的青少年仍可使用社交媒体，但平台必须提供更严格的保护措施 过滤不适龄内容、限制与陌生人互动、管理屏幕使用时间 ，以及供家长监督账号使用情况。 所有在阿联酋运营的社交媒体平台都必须遵守新规，并采取 数字身份核验和 AI 辅助验证 等一系列严格的年龄验证措施。平台不能再把用户自行填写的年龄作为有效证明。 平台还 必须停用 15 岁以下儿童创建的账号，阻止用户绕过年龄验证系统，并且不得利用儿童个人数据投放定向广告或建立行为画像。 据IT之家了解，新规旨在减少儿童接触不适当内容、遭遇不安全网络互动、过度使用社交媒体，以及个人数据被收集等风险。社交媒体公司最多有 12 个月时间完成调整。 阿联酋表示，新规与国际社会加强儿童网络保护的方向一致，同时兼顾数字服务使用与安全保障。
items.summary_en: The United Arab Emirates has set the minimum age for social media use at 15, becoming the first Arab country to impose such a restriction. The new rule prohibits children under 15 from creating or using personal social media accounts, and requires platforms to implement strict age verification measures including digital identity checks and AI-assisted verification.
items.why_zh: 阿联酋成为首个对社交媒体使用设定年龄限制的阿拉伯国家，反映了全球加强儿童网络保护的趋势。
items.why_en: The UAE becomes the first Arab country to set a minimum age for social media use, reflecting a global trend toward stronger online child protection.

items.title_zh: Anthropic在首尔设立办事处，韩国成为全球AI竞争新战场
items.title_en: Korea emerges as global AI battleground as Anthropic launches Seoul office

items.why_en: Anthropic's Seoul office underscores Korea's strategic importance in the global AI race and may accelerate local AI ecosystem growth.

items.title_zh: 为防人才流失，消息称 DeepSeek 向潜在投资人提“不挖人”要求
items.title_en: DeepSeek Completes First External Funding at $50B+ Valuation, Asks Investors Not to Poach Staff
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 18 日消息，据外媒 CNBC 今天报道，总部位于杭州的深度求索人工智能基础技术研究有限公司（DeepSeek）已于本周完成首次外部融资，估值超过 500 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 3387.1 亿元人民币）。 IT之家在此援引 CNBC，DeepSeek 自成立以来一直拒绝外部融资，希望专注于研究而非商业运作。但在部分核心人才流失后，公司最终决定启动融资计划。 同时目前有传闻称，DeepSeek 创始人梁文锋今年 5 月在一场投资者线上会议中，向潜在资方提出一项特殊要求：投资 DeepSeek 的前提之一，是承诺不挖走 DeepSeek 的员工，也不鼓励他们另起炉灶。 不过， 目前我们还无法核实这一消息是否真实 ，因此上述信息需要谨慎看待。 去年年底，曾开发 DeepSeek V3 的罗福莉出走，转投小米并负责其 MiMo AI 团队，该团队随后推出的部分 AI 模型在基准测试中，已经超越了 DeepSeek 产品。 此外，中国企业为了获得更强的 AI 研发能力，也通过各种措施吸引拥有海外经验的人才。例如腾讯去年挖来了曾在 OpenAI 工作的姚顺雨，担任其首席 AI 科学家。 值得注意的是，梁文锋、姚顺雨等人都公开表达过类似观点，称中国未来应研发出 AGI（通用人工智能）。
items.summary_en: Chinese AI company DeepSeek has completed its first external funding round at a valuation of over $50 billion. The company reportedly asked investors to agree not to poach its employees, following the departure of key talent. The move comes as DeepSeek shifts from a research-focused approach to seeking external capital.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的融资和“不挖人”要求反映了中国AI公司对人才流失的担忧，以及其在商业化与人才保留之间的平衡策略。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's funding and anti-poaching request highlight Chinese AI firms' concerns about talent drain and their strategy to balance commercialization with talent retention.

items.summary_en: Photoshop is one of several Adobe Creative Cloud apps to receive new conversational editing capabilities. | Image: Adobe Adobe's plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its biggest editing and design apps. As part of a public beta launching today, Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io now each have a bespoke AI Assistant that can be used to organize your work and automate app-specific tasks. While the AI assistants are all powered by Adobe's " conversational creative agent ," they work indep…
items.why_zh: Adobe在核心创意应用中全面部署AI助手，将显著提升创意工作者的效率和创作体验。
items.why_en: Adobe's deployment of AI assistants across its creative apps will significantly enhance productivity and creative experience for users.

items.summary_en: Give your characters, objects, and backgrounds a name to easily replicate them without changing the design. | Image: Adobe Adobe is introducing some new capabilities for its Firefly AI assistant, alongside a "reimagined" AI studio that lets you edit and generate new designs from a single interface. The new Firefly experience launching today in private beta is designed to give you "persistent context, reusable assets, and organized workflows" across your projects, according to Adobe, making it easier to go from ideation to production-ready designs without switching between apps. This is the lat…
items.why_zh: Adobe的AI工作室更新通过持久上下文和可重用资产，提升了AI辅助设计的连贯性和效率，有望改变创意工作流程。
items.why_en: Adobe's AI studio update enhances design consistency and efficiency with persistent context and reusable assets, potentially transforming creative workflows.

items.title_zh: Canonical 推出本地语音转文字项目 Myna，为 Ubuntu 26.10 引入 AI 听写功能
items.title_en: Canonical Launches Local Speech-to-Text Project Myna, Bringing AI Dictation to Ubuntu 26.10
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 18 日消息，当地时间 6 月 17 日，Canonical 公布了一项名为 Project Myna 的新项目，旨在为 Ubuntu 桌面操作系统引入本地化的语音转文字功能。 该项目得名于擅长模仿人类说话的鹩哥 / 八哥鸟，首个版本计划随 Ubuntu 26.10（Stonking Stingray）一同发布，并成为 Ubuntu 桌面体验的核心组成部分。 Myna 被定位为一款原生桌面听写工具，而非语音助手或语音控制系统。IT之家注意到，用户按下键盘快捷键后即可开始说话，转录后的文字会直接插入当前正在使用的应用程序中，听写过程中屏幕会显示明确的视觉反馈。 Canonical 表示，首版功能范围将刻意收窄，不会涉及语音助手、语音命令、桌面控制、翻译工具或自动语言检测等功能，目标是把基础听写体验做扎实。 在技术架构上，Myna 使用 AI 语音识别模型，所有识别任务均在用户本地机器上运行，下载安装必要的模型后无需任何互联网连接。首版以 Wayland 上的 Ubuntu 桌面为目标，GNOME 是主要验证环境，架构保持开放以便未来支持更多桌面环境。 另外，麦克风仅在用户主动激活听写时才会被访问，音频数据在内存中处理后即被丢弃，不会上传至任何外部服务。整体架构采用模块化设计，语音识别、用户交互、听写管理和文本注入分别由独立组件处理，以便后续对各部分单独改进而不影响整…
items.summary_en: Canonical announced Project Myna, a local speech-to-text feature for Ubuntu desktop, set to debut with Ubuntu 26.10. It is a native dictation tool that runs entirely offline, processing audio locally and discarding data after use.
items.why_zh: Myna项目为Ubuntu用户提供了隐私安全的本地语音听写功能，是桌面AI应用的重要进展。
items.why_en: Project Myna brings privacy-safe local voice dictation to Ubuntu, marking a significant step in desktop AI applications.
